name: arsonkupik
description: Privacy-first professional browser audio enhancer built on the Web Audio API.

scripts.check: node scripts/check_repository_identity.mjs && node scripts/run-python.mjs scripts/validate.py && node scripts/smoke_privacy.mjs && node scripts/smoke_support.mjs
scripts.release:check: node scripts/check_repository_identity.mjs && node scripts/run-python.mjs scripts/validate.py --release && node scripts/smoke_privacy.mjs && node scripts/smoke_support.mjs
